body.title: Global knowledge base as a git repo (community-contributable)
body.result: bootstrap module + seed patterns + uu bootstrap subcommand; 5 baseline patterns in global_kb/; format spec in README; docs/GlobalKB.md; GitHub repo creation is Akien's action when ready
body.description:
The global knowledge tier is a standalone git repository, separate from the UU code repo. New UU instances clone it at bootstrap to get universal patterns (agent templates, common coding idioms, ticket shapes, Igor baseline memories). Community members contribute improvements via PRs — git gives versioning, attribution, and governance for free.

Bootstrap flow: `uu bootstrap` clones the global KB repo (configurable URL, defaults to the canonical repo) and imports into the local Global DB. Periodic pulls keep it updated. The global repo ships JSONL + SQL dump formats so instances can choose import method.

The Archivist's contribution path (T-archivist-global-contrib, follow-on): locally-proven patterns that pass a quality threshold get staged for PR to the global repo. Not in this ticket — contribution tooling is a follow-on once the repo exists and has structure.

**Affected files:** new repo `unseen-university-kb` (or similar — separate from this repo); `uu` CLI or bootstrap script; import tooling; docs/GlobalKB.md in UU repo explaining the relationship

**Design rules:** no-sqlite; JSONL + SQL export for portability; git history is the audit trail; no live credentials or instance-specific data in the global repo (gitignored categories enforced)

**Scope boundary:** IN — global KB repo structure (JSONL + SQL schema); bootstrap clone + import; update/pull mechanism; format spec for pattern records. OUT — contribution tooling from Archivist (T-archivist-global-contrib); governance/merge rules (README describes, no enforcement tooling yet); client or agent-specific data (those never touch the global repo)

**Completion criteria:** (1) `uu bootstrap --global-kb <url>` clones and imports; (2) global KB repo has documented record format; (3) a new UU instance boots with at least one baseline pattern from the global KB; (4) no credentials, ticket IDs, or instance-specific paths in the global KB repo
